title: Programming and Querying Skills
content: Core programming and querying tools include Python, SQL, PySpark, Spark SQL, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, MySQL, SQL Server, and MongoDB.

title: RAG and LLM Stack
content: Nishanth works with LangChain, LlamaIndex, FAISS, Chroma, Hugging Face, OpenAI API integrations, prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation, reranking, memory management, and AI agents.

title: AI and Machine Learning Tools
content: AI and machine learning experience includes PyTorch, TensorFlow, JAX, Transformers, Diffusers, SentenceTransformers, spaCy, OpenCV, CNN models, LSTM models, tokenization workflows, and applied NLP pipelines.

title: Data Engineering Tools
content: Data engineering experience includes ETL and ELT design, Airflow, dbt, Snowflake, Kafka, Spark, Databricks, GitHub Actions, FastAPI, and Streamlit-based application delivery.

title: Cloud and Infrastructure
content: Cloud and infrastructure experience includes AWS services such as S3, EC2, Lambda, Bedrock, SageMaker, Glue, Athena, EMR, Redshift, QuickSight, CloudWatch, and SNS, along with Azure Data Factory, Azure Logic Apps, Azure Data Lake Storage, Microsoft Fabric, and Docker.

title: Analytics and Visualization Tools
content: Analytics and visualization tools include Tableau, Power BI, Looker, Amazon QuickSight, Excel with VBA and Power Query, Matplotlib, Seaborn, Flourish, and Datawrapper.
